title: Croatian Frittata
description: A traditional Croatian-style omelette filled with melted cheese and perfect for a quick breakfast or brunch.
instructions: Crack the frittata into a bowl and whisk until smooth.
Add the grated cheese and mix well.
Melt the butter in a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Pour the frittata mixture into the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 10-12 minutes.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for 1-2 minutes.
Slide the frittata onto a plate and serve hot.
